query: SELECT countyName, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(AVG(CAST(assessedToSaleRatio AS DECIMAL(10,4))), 4) as avg_ratio, ROUND(MIN(CAST(assessedToSaleRatio AS DECIMAL(10,4))), 4) as min_ratio, ROUND(MAX(CAST(assessedToSaleRatio AS DECIMAL(10,4))), 4) as max_ratio FROM sales GROUP BY countyName ORDER BY countyName;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Lyf6vpHy5kosAX.ad5e7732c0a3 --database KxciJFHZo62ThWBBp8dHpL --execute SELECT countyName, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(AVG(CAST(assessedToSaleRatio AS DECIMAL(10,4))), 4) as avg_ratio, ROUND(MIN(CAST(assessedToSaleRatio AS DECIMAL(10,4))), 4) as min_ratio, ROUND(MAX(CAST(assessedToSaleRatio AS DECIMAL(10,4))), 4) as max_ratio FROM sales GROUP BY countyName ORDER BY countyName;
